name: aries-ventures-fullstack
description: Full-stack web application for Aries Ventures

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && python3.11 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements/development.txt

author: Aries Ventures
